description: Rebrand the Socioboard web interface by modifying the Laravel frontend files located at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/ to reflect new company branding. The updated interface must feature the HTML title 'Apex Social Hub', the login page heading 'Welcome to Apex Digital Media', and a top navigation bar with the background color '#1B2A4A'. All changes must be saved to the source files and be reflected at http://localhost.
